chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Appeal No. D – 31 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.1 at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1061/2020 (Ex.) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.1062/2020 (Stay) 09-11-2021 None present on behalf of the Appellant nor any intimation is received. Record reflects that for the last many dates, nobody had turned up, and on 07-10-2021, Counsel for the Appellant was directed to come prepared and satisfy as to maintainability of this Appeal, as apparently, the Appellant was never a party before the Courts below. On 02-11-2021, again nobody was in attendance and the following order was passed: “None present nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing, Counsel for the Petitioner was directed to come prepared and satisfy as to office objection No.1 regarding maintainability of this appeal on the ground that the appellant was not a party before the Courts below; however today nobody has turned up and the matter was kept aside but again in the second round none is in attendance. Only as an indulgence and last & final chance, adjourned to 09.11.2021 with a note of caution if no assistance is provided, this appeal will be dismissed for non- prosecution without further orders.” Today, again nobody is in attendance, which reflects that the Appellant has no case to satisfy as to the aforesaid objection. Accordingly, the Appeal is hereby dismissed as being not maintainable with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
